name: The Ivy Inn's Scallop & Shrimp Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Add shrimp and scallops; season with salt and pepper. Cook until shrimp turns pink and scallops are golden.
3. Remove the pan from the heat and stir in white wine, sliced mushrooms, cream of celery soup, and sour cream until well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to a greased casserole dish. Sprinkle cheddar cheese on top.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until bubbly and lightly browned. Turn off oven heat and let the casserole stand in the dish for 10 minutes before serving.
